title: Array Technologies Stock News and Overview
text: Array Technologies engages in manufacture and sale of solar tracking technology products in United States, Spain, Brazil, Australia, and internationally. Q1 2026 saw strong execution with $223M revenue, record $2.4B order book, and 30.7% adjusted gross margin. However, reported GAAP EPS of -$0.09 down -550.00% YoY with reported revenue of $223.41M down -26.11% YoY. Company backs FY26 revenue view of $1.4B-$1.5B with adjusted EBITDA view of $200M-$230M. According to 18 analysts, average rating for ARRY stock is Buy, with 12-month stock price target of $10.33, increase of 19.84% from latest price. Challenges include tariffs pinching margins, federal energy policies drag, and demand looking weaker than expected. Array Technologies announced opening of new headquarters of APA Solar, Array company and solar racking and foundations solutions provider.
